title: Craftable Gunpowder[MOD]
description: A simple mod that lets you craft Gunpowder with just Coal, Sand, and Gravel—no more Creeper hunting! Explosives made easy for all your TNT and firework fun!
body:
**Mod Description:**

This mod introduces a new crafting recipe for Gunpowder, offering players an alternative way to obtain this valuable resource without needing to rely solely on Creeper drops. With this datapack, you can craft 3 Gunpowder using easily accessible materials from the world.

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea767c8b990dda324a1c55c03ebba44efda89775.png)

![gunpowder recipe[charcoal]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce601113f5dbb3a553b44db04676fd590b33e250.png)

### Recipe:
- **Ingredients:**
  - 1 Coal or 1 charcoal [download 2.0-1.21.X or 2.0-1.20.X version for charcoal recipe]
  - 1 Sand 
  - 1 Gravel
- **Output:**
  - 3 Gunpowder

This simple addition is perfect for players looking to streamline their TNT crafting or ammunition needs without the danger of hunting Creepers. The recipe provides a balanced and lore-friendly alternative, making Gunpowder more accessible for all your explosive needs!. If you want Datapack version it is [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftable-gunpower)
